essence: Manages construction projects on site, coordinating teams, schedules, budgets, and safety to deliver works.

identity.title: Construction Site Manager
identity.summary: Oversees all on‑site activities, liaises with clients and subcontractors, and ensures projects are delivered on time and to spec.

salary.notes: Large project managers and those in specialist sectors command premium salaries.

qualifications: Degree or HNC in construction management or equivalent experience
Proven site management experience and leadership
Knowledge of contracts, health & safety, and quality control
Strong communication and stakeholder management skills

lifestyle.description: High‑responsibility role with long hours, frequent meetings, and direct accountability for project delivery and safety.
